Ice of Velious  
 


This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Ice of Velious

This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 4 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-11-27 19:16:56
Page Updated:Sat Nov 22nd, 2025

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 13,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 20
[Drops | Quests | Recipes | Comments ]
This item is found by foraging.
This item is found by fishing.

Post Comment
Farming
QuoteReply
# Jan 03 2024 at 7:15 PM Rating: Decent
woodjom
Scholar
37 posts
When in Twilight Sea, cleared one full round and obtained three (3) of these from Water Elementals. Not once did I receive one from Earth, Air, or Fire.

It is possible after multiple clearings but does not make sense for Fire, tbh. Air and Earth, maybe; but I would think it would be a feature of Water more than Air and Earth.
▲ Page top
Farming
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2025 at 3:17 PM Rating: Decent
Monsieur Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
Permafrost Keep is the best I have found.
▲ Page top
TLP farming Ice of Velious
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2022 at 9:50 AM Rating: Decent
Wyora
9 posts
Currently in TBS, so far I've found the best place to farm this is Elemental Island in Twilight Sea. Not exactly a common drop, but waiting to do this in TBS means I'm also getting Sunshard Dust at the same time.
▲ Page top
Forage Locations
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2022 at 7:55 AM Rating: Decent
FireNightblade
Scholar
16 posts
I have been sitting in Eastern Wastes (ToV) for about an hour now foraging and fishing, haven't gotten a single Ice of Velious. Is this really able to be foraged and fished here?

Edited, Jun 3rd 2022 9:00am by FireNightblade
▲ Page top
Forage Locations
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2022 at 1:26 PM Rating: Excellent
Drewinette
View User Forum
1,658 posts
FireNightblade wrote:
I have been sitting in Eastern Wastes (ToV) for about an hour now foraging and fishing, haven't gotten a single Ice of Velious. Is this really able to be foraged and fished here?

Yes, still a pretty rare forage, and maybe an even more rare fishing.

Forage Locations
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2022 at 10:53 PM Rating: Decent
FireNightblade
Scholar
16 posts
Thanks, yeah I foraged and fished for about 2 hours before running out of bait. After that I just left, not high enough to kill there so I figured no point spending all day there.

Kinda rare, but not the end of the world
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2019 at 8:28 PM Rating: Decent
Rexa007
Scholar
16 posts
Twilight Sea is still the best place. Sometimes you get one per clear, and sometimes you get several per clear. In about thirty minutes I got 4 so far.
▲ Page top
Kinda rare, but not the end of the world
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2019 at 4:42 AM Rating: Decent
Monsieur Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
Congrats! I have been there, but did not have such luck. I did, however, get a few to drop.
▲ Page top
Goblin Warlord / Lake of Ill Omen
QuoteReply
# May 12 2019 at 8:57 PM Rating: Good
Monsieur Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
One just dropped off a Goblin Warlord in Lake of Ill Omen.

They have been dropping quite a bit in Upper Guk. I got one off a:

Shin Warrior
Fungus Drone
Shin Shaman

It's a total snowstorm right now in Upper Guk; they usually never drop this much.

Permafrost is better than Upper Guk, the drop rate is about the same, but the gobos respawn a lot faster in Permafrost.

Edited, May 13th 2019 12:03am by Ebelch

Edited, Oct 14th 2020 4:17pm by Ebelch
▲ Page top
DROPPED IN SOUTH KARANA BY AVIAK HARRIER
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2019 at 8:07 PM Rating: Good
Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
One just dropped a minute ago in South Karana by a Aviak Harrier. I can't confirm, but I think Ice drops with more frequently in the Old World; any zone from any mob 20-30 level (preferably mid 24-27 lvl).
▲ Page top
Permafrost Keep
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2019 at 10:50 AM Rating: Good
Siella
Scholar
25 posts
Dropped in Permafrost Keep the other night. Cleared the zone about 2-3 times and got 2.
▲ Page top
Permafrost Keep
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2020 at 6:15 PM Rating: Decent
Monsieur Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
I have to say, Permafrost might be the best place to go. The gobos consistently drop about 1-2 every clearing, and the respawn time is really fast. In addition, people still seem to love Permafrost Crystals, which are an abundant drop.
▲ Page top

11/18/16 Tower of Frozen Shadow.... 2nd floor... ghosts, For every 10 clears you will get 1 Ice of velious. best spot i have found too get these... Reply if you have another spot.. Thanks Zadaris

Dropped off a fire elemental today in twilight sea.
▲ Page top
twilight sea
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2019 at 10:52 AM Rating: Good
Grove
Sage
478 posts
Thanks for the recommendation of Twilight Sea. Clearing the elementals produces one or two per round. A contained area with no rooms, hallways to navigate. One can almost just stand in the middle and kill by just killing what one sees. Tracking the few remaining helps.
▲ Page top
twilight sea

▲ Page top
Odd
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2019 at 7:09 AM Rating: Decent
Monsieur Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
The giants in Frontier Mountains are actually a great place to farm ice. If you can kill them in under a second, they re-spawn almost immediately. If you stick with it, you can get three pieces an hour (of constant killing). A DPS merc helps a lot.
▲ Page top
Still dropping...still selling
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2014 at 11:24 AM Rating: Good
BidenThyme
Scholar
137 posts
Just sold one of these on the Cazic server for 4K that I had looted some time ago in Mistmore. Unbelievable that anyone would pay 4K for such an item..but they apparently do. Rare piece perhaps, but seems it is used for a low level skill set of items.
